body.title: Remove approval/akien/awaiting_approval as settable statuses (status model step 2)
body.description:
Step 2 of D-ticket-status-model-2026-06-16. Remove approval/akien/awaiting_approval as settable statuses — sorted=approved makes them redundant. NOTE: the original sprint→ready string rename COLLAPSED (step 1 kept sprint internal, READY as display/concept name), so this is now LOW blast radius.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py (STATUS_ORDER legacy section, _ACTIONABLE_STATUSES still contains akien/approval — drop them; _ID_STATUS_OVERRIDE pins T-uc-cert-domain-migration=akien); the /sorted gate (sets status=approval then sprint — simplify to sprint); queue_view.py + web_server legacy labels can drop once 0 rows remain.
**Design rules:** no-sqlite, log-state-change, test-plan; verify claim/dispatch loop unaffected (akien/approval are in _ACTIONABLE_STATUSES today).
**Scope boundary:** IN — remove the 3 statuses from settable set + simplify the sorted gate + migrate the 1 live akien ticket. OUT — the literal sprint→ready rename (deliberately NOT done — see decision doc rename-collapse note).
**Open question for Akien:** where does T-uc-cert-domain-migration (status akien, his external domain action, GH#413) land? Recommend DEPENDENCY (blocked on Akien action) per the model. His ticket, his call — that's why this is filed not auto-executed.
**Test plan:** after removal, /sprint-ticket still finds work; the migrated cert ticket renders under its new status; 0 approval/akien/awaiting_approval rows remain.

**SCOPE CORRECTION (Akien 2026-06-16, CC.0):** `akien` is NOT a removable status — it is Akien's intentional at-a-glance 'these are mine' ownership bucket ('reason we have an akien category is so i can see at a glance which are mine'). REVISED SCOPE: remove ONLY `approval` and `awaiting_approval` as settable statuses; KEEP `akien` settable. The original 'migrate the 1 live akien ticket' step is CANCELLED — T-uc-cert-domain-migration STAYS on `akien` (do NOT move to DEPENDENCY; the earlier open-question recommendation is overruled by Akien). _ACTIONABLE_STATUSES: drop approval only, keep akien. This is CC.0 design work — not a builder hand-off.
body.result: CC-validated: already shipped across 84da5557 (drop approval/awaiting_approval from settable+actionable) + 3a9da5e3 (keep akien settable per Akien's scope correction). Verified empirically this session: setstatus rejects 'approval' (settable list includes akien), accepts 'akien'; 0 live approval/awaiting_approval rows; T-uc-cert-domain-migration stays on akien; /sorted files straight to sprint. Legacy display labels intentionally retained per ticket_status.py docstring (render legacy rows until full migration). No code change needed.
